ogTitle: Pakenham South vs Panitya: Climate Safety

heading: Pakenham South vs Panitya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pakenham South, Victoria and Panitya, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pakenham South has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Panitya (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pakenham South or Panitya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pakenham South has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Panitya scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pakenham South scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Panitya scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pakenham South or Panitya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pakenham South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
